templates.name: Complaint Registered
templates.content: Your complaint {token} has been registered. We will address it within {sla_days} days.

templates.name: Acknowledgment
templates.content: Your complaint {token} has been acknowledged by {officer_name}. Expected resolution by {eta}.

templates.name: Status Update
templates.content: Your complaint {token} status has been updated to {status}.

templates.name: Resolution Notice
templates.content: Your complaint {token} has been resolved. Please rate our service: {rating_link}

templates.name: SLA Warning
templates.content: Complaint {token} is approaching SLA deadline. {days_left} days remaining.

templates.name: SLA Breach Alert
templates.content: SLA BREACH: Complaint {token} has exceeded the resolution deadline. Immediate action required.

templates.name: Escalation Notice
templates.content: Complaint {token} has been escalated to Level {level}. Assigned to {target_role}.

templates.name: Reassignment Notice
templates.content: Complaint {token} has been reassigned from {old_officer} to {new_officer}.
